prompt: Wide angle documentary photography. Inside a massive, dimly lit industrial warehouse. The space is completely choked and overflowing with tens of thousands of perfectly stacked, identical, blank white cardboard shipping boxes. Buried at the very bottom corner under the immense crushing weight of the white boxes is one single, tiny, bright red box. Highly realistic, physical, dusty, physical shadows, 8k. --no glowing lights, no text, no labels, no computers, no tech, no robots, no graphs, no diagrams
metaphor: A massive industrial warehouse packed with thousands of identical white crates, completely burying a single, tiny, crushed red box at the bottom.
